---
pagetitle: "Media & Video Engagements"
description: "Television appearances, podcast episodes, and media quotes by Anushka Saxena on Chinese military affairs and Indo-Pacific geopolitics."
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-hero">
  <div class="section-label">Engagements</div>
  <h1>Videos &amp; Media</h1>
  <p>Television appearances, podcast episodes, and media commentary on geopolitics and security.</p>
</header>

<section class="as-section">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="section-label">Watch &amp; Listen</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Video &amp; Podcast Appearances</h2>
    <div class="gold-divider"></div>
    <div class="as-filter">
      <span>&#128269;</span>
      <input type="text" data-filter="media-list" placeholder="Filter videos &amp; podcasts…">
    </div>
```

{{< include _includes/media.html >}}

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>

<section class="as-section as-section-alt">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="section-label">In the Press</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Media Quotes &amp; Comments</h2>
    <div class="gold-divider"></div>
    <div class="as-filter">
      <span>&#128269;</span>
      <input type="text" data-filter="quotes-list" placeholder="Filter media mentions…">
    </div>
```

{{< include _includes/quotes.html >}}

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>
<script src="site.js"></script>
```
